output_summary.topic: YOLOv8 for real-time steel surface defect detection on NEU-DET dataset

research_basis.title: Benchmarking YOLOv8 for Real-Time Steel Surface Defect Detection on NEU-DET
research_basis.research_question: How does YOLOv8 compare to established baselines (YOLOv5, Faster R-CNN, SSD, RetinaNet) in terms of detection accuracy and inference speed for steel surface defect detection on the NEU-DET dataset?
research_basis.baseline: Face Detection with the Faster R-CNN
research_basis.improved_module_source: You Only Look Once: Unified, Real-Time Object Detection
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Cascade R-CNN: High Quality Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
research_basis.risk: NEU-DET dataset not directly accessible in evidence; may require additional data sourcing.

research_basis.title: Adapting YOLOv8 Architecture for Industrial Steel Defect Detection
research_basis.research_question: Can architectural improvements from CF-DETR (coarse-to-fine transformer) be adapted to YOLOv8 to enhance real-time defect detection performance on NEU-DET?
research_basis.baseline: Face Detection with the Faster R-CNN
research_basis.improved_module_source: CF-DETR: Coarse-to-Fine Transformer for Real-Time Object Detection
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Cascade R-CNN: High Quality Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
research_basis.risk: Transferring transformer-based improvements to YOLOv8 may require significant architectural changes.

research_basis.title: Few-Shot Learning for Steel Defect Detection with YOLOv8
research_basis.research_question: How effective is YOLOv8 with Meta Faster R-CNN-inspired few-shot learning for detecting rare steel defects in NEU-DET?
research_basis.baseline: Meta Faster R-CNN: Towards Accurate Few-Shot Object Detection with Attentive Feature Alignment
research_basis.improved_module_source: Meta Faster R-CNN: Towards Accurate Few-Shot Object Detection with Attentive Feature Alignment
research_basis.experiment_metrics: Cascade R-CNN: High Quality Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
research_basis.risk: Few-shot learning may not generalize well to industrial defects without sufficient annotated samples.

tailor_gate.rationale: The tailored method is compatible, falsifiable, and no simpler route is evident; all open gaps are already satisfied.
